name: I have asthma already but it got way worse from factory dust in Boise—can I still claim?
description: Yes, work-aggravated pre-existing asthma qualifies if job substantially increased risk.[3]

mainEntity.name: I have asthma already but it got way worse from factory dust in Boise—can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, work-aggravated pre-existing asthma qualifies if job substantially increased risk.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, aggravation of pre-existing conditions by work is compensable if employment substantially increased the risk.[3] Utah recognizes 'lighting up' of prior diseases via occupational exposure under ODA or WCA.[3] Key factors: medical proof of work contribution beyond everyday risks, causation link, and no idiopathic origin.[2][3] Obtain specialist reports comparing pre- and post-exposure, notify employer promptly, file claim emphasizing aggravation. Successful claims often hinge on this evidence.
